productDisplayName: Levis Men Comfort Style Green Innerwear Vest
description: Soft and stretchy vest made from 95% combed cotton and 5% elastane. This is a green vest with high round neck and broad shoulders. The original two horse Levi's logo features prominently on the back neck plus the signature red tag is stitched to the bottom hemWash careMachine wash coldDo not bleachTumble dry lowCold iron as neededDo not dry cleanClassic vest shape and prominent Levi's logo combine to create a ultra masculine vest to be worn under any outfit.
